query:
SELECT at.instance_id, ai.request_id, at.stage_id, at.status, COUNT(*) as task_count
FROM approval_tasks at
JOIN approval_instances ai ON at.instance_id = ai.id
WHERE at.status = 'pending'
GROUP BY at.instance_id, ai.request_id, at.stage_id, at.status
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
LIMIT 10
